fault_hypothesis: The code on line 69 incorrectly removes an element from the result list. This happens when both input lists are non-empty and share the same maximum value, due to a faulty de-duplication check on line 68.

constraints.intent: The total number of elements in the merged list must equal the sum of elements from the input lists.
This special-case de-duplication logic is incorrect and should never be executed.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition to trigger removal of a supposed duplicate element should never be met.
